props.title: Andrej Berlin On AI Facilitation
props.subtitle: Sensemaking, attention scarcity, Deep Work, and human curation

cards.title: AI as facilitation layer
cards.body: AI helps turn many people's inputs into shared language that participants can still recognize as their own.

cards.title: AI-assisted sensemaking
cards.body: Interviews, surveys, profiles, Discord, and Telegram become summaries, dashboards, recommendations, and collaborator matches.

cards.title: Attention scarcity
cards.body: As AI makes it easier to build and generate more, the harder problem becomes choosing what deserves focus.

cards.title: Renewed Deep Work
cards.body: A network of experts, founders, residencies, product and design support, AI-enabled research, prototyping, and collective learning.

cards.title: Taste and curation
cards.body: AI can expand options, but someone still needs to provide direction, judgment, and a point of view.
